note: Trainings people can apply to. 'questions' become extra fields on the application form: t=select needs options, t=text is a free line, t=long is a paragraph.

trainings.name: CFJC Workforce Readiness Program
trainings.audience: Connecticut residents ready to train into a hired trade
trainings.body: Four-week pre-employment apprenticeship training timed to employers' hiring schedules — certified instructors, DOL-compliant, with comprehensive life-skills training, application counseling, and mock interviews. Employers get pre-screened, well-prepared candidates; the program can graduate 125 residents a year.

questions.label: Which training area interests you most?

trainings.name: Homebuyer Education & Counseling
trainings.body: From first conversation to keys: homebuyer education, credit preparation, and one-on-one housing counseling that walks your family from renting to owning.

questions.label: Where are you in the journey?

trainings.name: Foreclosure Prevention & Intervention
trainings.audience: Homeowners behind on payments or facing foreclosure
trainings.body: Part of Homes Saved By Faith — more than 100,000 individuals serviced. Confidential help with your servicer, your options, and your next step. The earlier you reach out, the more doors are open.

trainings.name: Financial Empowerment Series
trainings.body: The Faith Empowerment Series model: credit, budgeting, banking, and homeownership readiness — practical household finance, taught in the community, in plain English.

questions.label: Which topic matters most to you?

trainings.name: Bring the MLK Corridor to your city
trainings.audience: Congregations, community organizations, and municipalities anywhere in America
trainings.body: Tell us about your organization and your city, and the Corridors pipeline starts: we confirm whether your city has a street named for Dr. King, research the right officials, and build the outreach and funding proposal with you.

questions.label: Does your city have a street or corridor named for Dr. King?
options: Not sure — please check for me

questions.label: If yes — the corridor today is…
Local partners already at the table (if any)
Financial support you expect to seek

trainings.name: Capacity Building for Faith-Based Organizations
trainings.body: For institutions, not individuals: form your CDC, seat your board, design your programs, and build revenue that renews itself. The same training FREEDOM delivers nationally — including for NeighborWorks America Training Institutes.

questions.label: What does your organization want to build?
